markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call to explore a potential partnership between Appfire and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Appfire's Challenge:** Appfire is repositioning its brand to stand alone, moving from a partner-led model to direct-to-marketplace sales. This shift is driven by Atlassian's chaotic partner program changes and requires a complete overhaul of its GTM strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Solution:** GrowthX offers an end-to-end service combining an AI platform with a full-service agency (strategy, SEO/AEO, content production) to drive compounding organic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
  - [**Decision:** Appfire will defer a partnership. The company is currently focused on foundational website cleanup (e.g., consolidating legacy domains, indexing a technical docs site) and will reconsider a partnership in a few months.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [**Immediate Action:** GrowthX will provide a free AI visibility audit using its `CheckThat.ai` platform to help Appfire establish a baseline for its new GTM strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)

## Topics

### Appfire's Strategic Pivot

  - [Appfire is repositioning its brand to stand alone, moving away from a "man behind the curtain" identity tied to the Atlassian ecosystem.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [**Primary Driver:** Atlassian's chaotic partner program changes, including a shift to direct sales and a de-emphasis on resale partners, which threatens Appfire's existing partner channel.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [**New GTM Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [Rebalance from partner-led to direct-to-marketplace sales.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
      - [Diversify into other marketplaces (e.g., Salesforce, Monday) to reduce dependency on Atlassian.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)
  - [**Current Bottlenecks:**](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [Consolidating legacy domains from acquisitions.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [Indexing a previously unindexed technical documentation site.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=814.0)
      - [Refreshing the website's IA and content to reflect the new brand narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)

### GrowthX's End-to-End Service

  - [GrowthX provides a platform and service to drive compounding organic growth by optimizing a company's website for both human buyers and AI agents.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [**Service Components:**](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [**Platform:** `CheckThat.ai` for AI visibility tracking and an "agentic framework" for content execution.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [**Agency:** A full-service team providing:](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
          - [Strategy & SEO/AEO](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
          - [Content Production (40+ editors, designers, publishers)](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
          - [Technical fixes (e.g., broken links)](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [All engagements begin with a mandatory 3-week "Strategy Sprint" to build a strong foundation.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=987.0)
      - [**Deliverables:** V1 brand artifacts, a content strategy, and a keyword universe analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**Case Study (Augment Code):**](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [Grew organic traffic significantly in 6–7 months, nearly eliminating paid ad spend.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
      - [Produced 200+ articles (guides, comparisons, thought leadership).](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marcel (GrowthX):** Provide a free AI visibility audit for Appfire using `CheckThat.ai`.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [**Catherine (Appfire):** Re-engage with GrowthX in a few months after completing foundational website cleanup.](https://fathom.video/share/vVxw64UQZe8nLKuH9SzHatVzry5-ZzWz?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
